criticalRules: Control port is refresh trigger, NOT clock
exprs line 0: color indices for each input (e.g., "1 1" for 2 inputs)
exprs line 7: refresh period, buffer size ("30 30")
CRITICAL: Scope blocks MUST have a CLOCK_c block connected to their ControlPort (red top port) via a CommandControlLink, otherwise graph is empty.
description: Multi-channel scope - displays multiple signals on same axis with color differentiation
anomalies: Complex exprs with 11 parameters including color codes
Real parameters include [0, 30, 30, -1, 1, -5, 5] for view bounds
Color mapping: 1 3 5 7... are color indices for each input
name: CMSCOPE
